description: An outdoor photograph of a man in a dark blue suit and light tie standing at a wooden lectern bearing the U.S. Customs and Border Protection seal. Behind him is a large CBP badge emblem draped with a black mourning band on dark display panels. A memorial trophy and a vase of white flowers stand on the stage in front of the lectern, with black-draped tables and white roses nearby.
notable_text: U.S. CUSTOMS AND BORDER PROTECTION; In Remembrance of our Fallen Comrades
